description_long: This is a rectangular, softcover book with a predominantly light gray and white color scheme. The front cover features a detailed black-and-white illustration of a flying bat, rendered in a realistic, hand-drawn style. The book's title is prominently displayed in a large, bold font on the front cover, with additional subtitle text beneath it. The spine is visible and includes the title, a small logo, and a vertical orientation for the text. The book appears to be of average thickness, with visible page edges along the sides. The overall design is clean and modern, with minimal decorative elements aside from the central illustration.
description: A light gray and white softcover book featuring a realistic bat illustration on the front and bold title text. The spine displays the title and a small logo in a vertical layout.
description_view_0: The book is seen from a low side angle, highlighting the thickness and layered appearance of the pages.
description_view_1: Viewed from the bottom edge, the book's front cover and the bat illustration are partially visible, with the page edges clearly shown.
description_view_2: This angled side view reveals the spine with vertical title text and a small logo, as well as the front cover's illustration.
description_view_3: A direct view of the front cover, showcasing the bat illustration and the full title text in bold lettering.
attribute_cover_illustration: A detailed, realistic black-and-white drawing of a bat in mid-flight dominates the center of the cover. The illustration is rendered with fine lines and shading, giving it a naturalistic and slightly scientific appearance.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is light gray with vertical white text displaying the title and a small black-and-white logo near the top. The design is simple and clean, with no additional decorative elements.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small circular logo with the text 'O RLY' is visible on the lower left of the front cover.
